steps.title: Project Intake
steps.desc: We start with a thorough understanding of your project scope, site conditions, local codes, and budget parameters to define a clear engineering roadmap.

steps.title: Structural & MEP Design
steps.desc: Our team develops accurate, code-compliant structural and MEP designs, coordinating all disciplines under one roof to eliminate conflicts and costly revisions.

steps.title: Permitting & Compliance
steps.desc: We prepare and submit all required documentation to the local municipality, managing the entire permitting process so your project stays on schedule.

steps.title: Construction Support
steps.desc: We remain engaged through construction, providing RFI responses, field inspections, and as-built evaluations to ensure faithful execution of the engineering design.

FAQ.title:
Common questions,
clear answers.
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting a conversation with our engineering team.

questions.q: What types of projects do you handle?
questions.a: We specialize in structural design for residential and commercial projects — from single and multi-family developments to low- and mid-rise buildings. We also provide MEP coordination, building recertifications, structural inspections, and as-built evaluations.

questions.q: Do you work under the Florida Building Code?
questions.a: Yes. We have extensive experience under the Florida Building Code and ensure all our designs are accurate, code-compliant, and thoroughly reviewed for constructability and cost-efficiency.

questions.q: Can you assist with the permitting process?
questions.a: Absolutely. We prepare all required engineering documentation and coordinate directly with local municipalities to ensure a smooth and timely permitting experience.

questions.q: What is a building recertification and when is it required?
questions.a: Building recertifications verify that existing structures remain safe and code-compliant. They are typically required at 25, 30, and 40-year milestones, and every 10 years thereafter. We handle the full inspection and reporting process.
Yes. We prepare high-quality shop drawings for stairs, railings, terraces, pergolas, trellis, fences, canopies, and other structural components as part of our structural engineering scope.

questions.q: How do you keep projects on budget?
questions.a: We approach every project with a strong focus on constructability and cost-efficiency. We communicate clearly throughout the process, helping you understand costs and trade-offs before decisions are made.

items.title: Code-Compliant Precision
items.desc: Every design is rigorously reviewed for accuracy and compliance with the Florida Building Code, prioritizing safety above all else.

items.title: Constructability Focus
items.desc: Our designs are built with real-world execution in mind — minimizing RFIs, reducing change orders, and keeping your project on schedule.

items.title: Integrated Delivery
items.desc: By unifying structural and MEP engineering under one firm, we eliminate coordination gaps and deliver a seamless, fully integrated solution.

cta.desc: Tell us about your project. Our engineering team is ready to deliver a precise, efficient, and stress-free experience from day one.

ServiceDetail.fallback_desc: By unifying design and construction, we eliminate the communication gaps that plague traditional project delivery. Our process guarantees that the architectural vision is executed precisely, on schedule, and within the agreed parameters. We act as your single point of responsibility, streamlining the entire journey from the initial sketch to the final walkthrough. Every detail, from structural framing to artisanal finishes, is meticulously coordinated under one roof.
ServiceDetail.dev_fallback: Detailed parameters curated per project scope.

phases.title: Assessment & Foundation
phases.desc: We begin with a granular analysis of your site, objectives, and parameters, laying the unshakeable groundwork for success.

phases.title: Design & Engineering
phases.desc: Rigorous planning and 3D modeling eliminate guesswork. We finalize all permits, structural engineering, and design intent.

phases.title: Precision Execution
phases.desc: Our in-house master builders and dedicated project managers execute the blueprints with militaristic precision.

faqs.q: Is this service customized to my specific property?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Every engagement begins with a bespoke assessment of your site conditions, local zoning laws, and personal aesthetic requirements. We never use out-of-the-box solutions.

faqs.q: Do you handle all necessary permitting internally?
faqs.a: Yes. To maintain full control over the project timeline, our dedicated in-house compliance team manages all municipal submissions, variances, and architectural review boards.

faqs.q: Will I have a dedicated point of contact?
faqs.a: To ensure absolute clarity, you are assigned a principal-level Project Director along with a dedicated Site Manager who provide weekly debriefs and are always accessible.

ServiceDetail.schedule: Schedule a discovery phase with our {service} specialists.

phases.title: Structural Analysis
phases.desc: We evaluate site constraints, load requirements, and preliminary architectural drawings to formulate a safe and efficient structural concept.

phases.title: Detailed Engineering
phases.desc: Our team prepares highly precise structural calculations and detailing, including shop drawings for all necessary structural components.

phases.title: Construction Support
phases.desc: We deliver code-compliant plans for permitting and remain involved to ensure seamless constructability and execution on-site.

faqs.q: Do you design for local building codes?
faqs.a: Yes, our engineering solutions are strictly code-compliant for the region, prioritizing safety, constructability, and long-term performance.

faqs.q: Can you provide shop drawings for specific components?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Our scope covers the detailing of structural systems including highly specific shop drawings for elements such as stairs, terraces, and pergolas.

faqs.q: Do you coordinate with the architectural team?
faqs.a: Coordination is central to our process. We ensure our structural systems integrate seamlessly into the architectural intent without compromising efficiency.

phases.title: Preliminary Assessment
phases.desc: We review historical property documentation and perform an initial visual site inspection to determine the audit scope.

phases.title: Structural & Electrical Audit
phases.desc: Our engineers conduct detailed non-destructive testing, concrete sounding, and comprehensive life-safety electrical panel reviews.

phases.title: Final Certification Report
phases.desc: We compile findings into a certified, signed, and sealed report submitted directly to the local municipality to ensure full compliance.

faqs.q: When is a building recertification required?
faqs.a: Depending on the jurisdiction, milestone inspections are typically mandated when a commercial or multi-family building reaches 25, 30, or 40 years of age, and every 10 years thereafter.

faqs.q: What happens if repairs are needed?
faqs.a: We outline a precise repair scope. Once repairs are executed by a licensed contractor, we reinspect the work and issue the final certification.

faqs.q: Does the recertification cover electrical systems?
faqs.a: Yes, thorough life-safety electrical inspections, including panel and wiring integrity reviews, are a mandatory component of our recertification audits.

phases.title: Site Evaluation
phases.desc: We perform a comprehensive visual inspection of the foundation, load-bearing walls, roof trusses, and structural connections.

phases.title: Diagnostic Testing
phases.desc: When required, we utilize advanced diagnostic tools such as infrared mapping or materials sampling to identify hidden anomalies.

phases.title: Mitigation Strategy
phases.desc: We provide a clear, actionable engineering report outlining root causes and prioritized repair methodologies for any deficiencies.

faqs.q: Do I need a structural inspection before buying a property?
faqs.a: It is highly recommended for older properties, commercial acquisitions, or if standard home inspectors note signs of cracking or settling.

faqs.q: Can you inspect for water-induced damage?
faqs.a: Yes, we trace how water intrusion may have compromised structural elements, identifying conditions like wood rot or concrete spalling.

faqs.q: Will I receive a signed engineering report?
faqs.a: Absolutely. All our inspections conclude with a detailed report, officially signed and sealed by a licensed Professional Engineer.

phases.title: Systems Concept Design
phases.desc: We evaluate the building's usage to determine accurate mechanical loads, electrical demands, and efficient plumbing routing.

phases.title: Clash Detection & Integration
phases.desc: Using advanced BIM modeling, we integrate MEP networks to ensure they do not interfere with structural or architectural elements.

phases.title: Final Engineering Drawings
phases.desc: We deliver precise, energy-code compliant plans ready for swift permitting and meticulous execution by specialized subcontractors.

faqs.q: Do you perform HVAC thermal load calculations?
faqs.a: Yes, we perform rigorous algorithmic thermal load calculations to ensure highly energy-efficient and perfectly sized mechanical systems.

faqs.q: Can you coordinate with interior designers?
faqs.a: Coordination is paramount. We route systems intelligently to preserve ceiling heights, lighting plans, and overall aesthetic goals.

faqs.q: Are your designs energy code compliant?
faqs.a: All our designs adhere strictly to the latest local energy conservation codes, prioritizing long-term sustainability and reduced operational costs.
